---
title: "ENGR 102 Bridge — Review Sheets"
subtitle: "Summer Bridge · Python Foundations & the Evidence Habit"
---

<!-- ============================================================
Site landing page. Orients students across all four weeks.
Fill in prose where marked TODO. No secure quiz content anywhere;
use only generic examples.
============================================================ -->

## What these sheets cover

<!-- TODO: 2–3 sentences on the arc across the four weeks. -->

## How to read the bands

Every sheet uses the same three bands:

::: {.trap-band}
⚠️ **Watch out** — the classic mistake for this topic.
:::

::: {.check-band}
✅ **Non-mutating check** — how to inspect state without changing it.
:::

::: {.evidence-band}
🔎 **Show your evidence** — how to prove you know it (predict / trace / test / debug / explain).
:::

## Sheet index

### Week 1 — Python Foundations & the Evidence Habit

| Sheet | Topic | Day |
|---|---|---|
| [Output vs. Stored State](week01/01_output_vs_state.qmd) | print vs. display vs. store | 1 |
| [Variables, Expressions, State](week01/02_variables_expressions_state.qmd) | current vs. planned | 2 |
| [Types, Casting, Truthiness](week01/03_types_casting_truthiness.qmd) | str/float/bool, casts | 3 |
| [Comparisons & Boundaries](week01/04_comparisons_boundaries.qmd) | inclusive/exclusive edges | 4 |
| [Boolean Combinations](week01/05_boolean_combinations.qmd) | and / or / not | 5 |

### Week 2 — *topic TBD*

| Sheet | Topic | Day |
|---|---|---|
| [Day 1](week02/day1.qmd) | TBD | 1 |
| [Day 2](week02/day2.qmd) | TBD | 2 |
| [Day 3](week02/day3.qmd) | TBD | 3 |
| [Day 4](week02/day4.qmd) | TBD | 4 |
| [Day 5](week02/day5.qmd) | TBD | 5 |

### Week 3 — *topic TBD*

| Sheet | Topic | Day |
|---|---|---|
| [Day 1](week03/day1.qmd) | TBD | 1 |
| [Day 2](week03/day2.qmd) | TBD | 2 |
| [Day 3](week03/day3.qmd) | TBD | 3 |
| [Day 4](week03/day4.qmd) | TBD | 4 |
| [Day 5](week03/day5.qmd) | TBD | 5 |

### Week 4 — *topic TBD*

| Sheet | Topic | Day |
|---|---|---|
| [Day 1](week04/day1.qmd) | TBD | 1 |
| [Day 2](week04/day2.qmd) | TBD | 2 |
| [Day 3](week04/day3.qmd) | TBD | 3 |
| [Day 4](week04/day4.qmd) | TBD | 4 |
| [Day 5](week04/day5.qmd) | TBD | 5 |

## Scope guardrails (read once)

- Week 1 uses **only** variables, expressions, comparisons, and Boolean logic.
- **No** `if/else`, loops, lists, or functions — those come later.
- A right final answer is **not enough**: show the trace/test/debug/explanation.
